meta.title: Connection Quest
meta.storageNote: Static content lives in JSON; Supabase stores only compact user/session state.

areas.name: Intro
areas.description: Start with playful basics and build trust.

areas.name: Attraction
areas.description: Explore what pulls you toward each other.

areas.name: Excitement
areas.description: Turn up anticipation and discover what feels thrilling.

areas.name: Romance
areas.description: Learn what makes the connection feel cherished.

areas.name: Affection
areas.description: Discover touch, closeness, and reassurance styles.

areas.name: Communication
areas.description: Make honesty and boundaries feel easy.

areas.name: Fantasy
areas.description: Explore imagination, curiosity, and private worlds.

areas.name: Bedroom Builder
areas.description: The hidden advanced builder for intimate compatibility.

areas.name: Future
areas.description: See whether your dreams and rhythms can grow together.
